name: test-case-generator-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Test case generation and coverage analysis by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_test_cases
tools.description: Generate test cases for a function based on its signature and parameter types.

tools.name: generate_edge_cases
tools.description: Generate edge cases and boundary conditions for a function.

tools.name: generate_test_matrix
tools.description: Generate a combinatorial test matrix from parameter value sets.

tools.name: assess_coverage
tools.description: Assess test coverage gaps for a function given existing test descriptions.
